{
 "cells": [
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "# Task 2d: Comparing several different NN Configurations on Iris Data"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "## Setup and Data Preprocessing"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 1,
   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [],
   "source": [
    "import tensorflow as tf\n",
    "from tensorflow import keras\n",
    "from tensorflow.keras import layers\n",
    "from tensorflow.keras.models import Sequential\n",
    "import numpy as np\n",
    "from pre_processing import pre_processing\n",
    "import matplotlib.pyplot as plt\n",
    "\n",
    "# Set seed for reproducibility\n",
    "seed = 42\n",
    "\n",
    "# Get preprocessed data using existing function\n",
    "# The pre_processing function is expected to split and normalise the Iris dataset\n",
    "training_data, test_data = pre_processing(seed=seed)\n",
    "tf.keras.utils.set_random_seed(seed)\n",
    "\n",
    "# Convert data format for Keras\n",
    "# Reshape feature vectors and extract labels from the data tuples\n",
    "X_train = np.array([x.reshape(-1) for x, _ in training_data])\n",
    "y_train = np.array([y for _, y in training_data])\n",
    "X_test = np.array([x.reshape(-1) for x, _ in test_data])\n",
    "y_test = np.array([y for _, y in test_data])\n",
    "\n",
    "# Convert labels to one-hot encoded format required for categorical crossentropy\n",
    "y_train = keras.utils.to_categorical(y_train)\n",
    "y_test = keras.utils.to_categorical(y_test)"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "## Define Model Creation and Training Function"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 2,
   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [],
   "source": [
    "def create_and_train_model(architecture, activation_functions, learning_rate, n_trials=10):\n",
    "    \"\"\"\n",
    "    Creates and trains a neural network with specified architecture multiple times.\n",
    "    \n",
    "    Args:\n",
    "        architecture (list): List of integers representing neurons in each hidden layer\n",
    "        activation_functions (list): Activation functions for each layer (including output)\n",
    "        learning_rate (float): Learning rate for SGD optimizer\n",
    "        n_trials (int): Number of training runs for averaging results\n",
    "    \n",
    "    Returns:\n",
    "        tuple: (final model, averaged training history with standard deviations)\n",
    "    \"\"\"\n",
    "\n",
    "    all_histories = []\n",
    "    \n",
    "    for trial in range(n_trials):\n",
    "        # Create new model for each trial\n",
    "        model = Sequential()\n",
    "\n",
    "        # Use initialisation with different seeds for each trial\n",
    "        kernel_initializer = tf.keras.initializers.GlorotUniform(seed=42+trial)\n",
    "        \n",
    "        # Input layer with shape matching feature dimensionality\n",
    "        model.add(layers.Input(shape=(4,)))\n",
    "        \n",
    "        # Add hidden layers according to specified architecture\n",
    "        for units, activation in zip(architecture, activation_functions[:-1]):\n",
    "            model.add(layers.Dense(units, activation=activation, kernel_initializer=kernel_initializer))\n",
    "        \n",
    "        # Add output layer with softmax activation for classification\n",
    "        model.add(layers.Dense(3, activation=activation_functions[-1], kernel_initializer=kernel_initializer))\n",
    "        \n",
    "        # Compile model with categorical crossentropy (suitable for multi-class)\n",
    "        model.compile(optimizer=tf.keras.optimizers.SGD(learning_rate),\n",
    "                     loss='categorical_crossentropy',\n",
    "                     metrics=['accuracy'])\n",
    "        \n",
    "        # Train the model\n",
    "        history = model.fit(X_train, y_train,\n",
    "                          validation_data=(X_test, y_test),\n",
    "                          epochs=50,\n",
    "                          batch_size=16,\n",
    "                          verbose=0,\n",
    "                          shuffle=False)\n",
    "        \n",
    "        all_histories.append(history.history)\n",
    "    \n",
    "    # Calculate mean and standard deviation across all trials\n",
    "    avg_history = {\n",
    "        'accuracy': np.mean([h['accuracy'] for h in all_histories], axis=0),\n",
    "        'val_accuracy': np.mean([h['val_accuracy'] for h in all_histories], axis=0),\n",
    "        'loss': np.mean([h['loss'] for h in all_histories], axis=0),\n",
    "        'val_loss': np.mean([h['val_loss'] for h in all_histories], axis=0),\n",
    "        'std_accuracy': np.std([h['accuracy'] for h in all_histories], axis=0),\n",
    "        'std_val_accuracy': np.std([h['val_accuracy'] for h in all_histories], axis=0),\n",
    "        'std_loss': np.std([h['loss'] for h in all_histories], axis=0),\n",
    "        'std_val_loss': np.std([h['val_loss'] for h in all_histories], axis=0)\n",
    "    }\n",
    "    \n",
    "    return model, avg_history"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "## Define Experiments"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 3,
   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [],
   "source": [
    "# Define different architectures to test\n",
    "experiments = {\n",
    "    'original': {\n",
    "        'architecture': [5, 3],\n",
    "        'activations': ['tanh', 'tanh', 'softmax'],\n",
    "        'learning_rate': 0.35,\n",
    "        'description': '4-5-3-3 (original)'\n",
    "    },\n",
    "    'smaller': {\n",
    "        'architecture': [3],\n",
    "        'activations': ['tanh', 'softmax'],\n",
    "        'learning_rate': 1.23,\n",
    "        'description': '4-3-3 (smaller)'\n",
    "    },\n",
    "    'larger': {\n",
    "        'architecture': [8, 6],\n",
    "        'activations': ['tanh', 'tanh', 'softmax'],\n",
    "        'learning_rate': 0.60,\n",
    "        'description': '4-8-6-3 (larger)'\n",
    "    },\n",
    "    'relu_based': {\n",
    "        'architecture': [5, 3],\n",
    "        'activations': ['relu', 'relu', 'softmax'],\n",
    "        'learning_rate': 0.85,\n",
    "        'description': '4-5-3-3 (ReLU)'\n",
    "    },\n",
    "    'deep': {\n",
    "        'architecture': [6, 4, 4],\n",
    "        'activations': ['tanh', 'tanh', 'tanh', 'softmax'],\n",
    "        'learning_rate': 0.27,\n",
    "        'description': '4-6-4-4-3 (deep)'\n",
    "    }\n",
    "}"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "## Train Models and Store Results"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 4,
   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [
    {
     "name": "stdout",
     "output_type": "stream",
     "text": [
      "\n",
      "Training 4-5-3-3 (original)...\n",
      "\n",
      "Training 4-3-3 (smaller)...\n",
      "\n",
      "Training 4-8-6-3 (larger)...\n",
      "\n",
      "Training 4-5-3-3 (ReLU)...\n",
      "\n",
      "Training 4-6-4-4-3 (deep)...\n"
     ]
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "# Train each configuration 10 times and store averaged results\n",
    "histories = {}\n",
    "for name, config in experiments.items():\n",
    "    print(f\"\\nTraining {config['description']}...\")\n",
    "    _, history = create_and_train_model(\n",
    "        config['architecture'],\n",
    "        config['activations'],\n",
    "        config['learning_rate'],\n",
    "        n_trials=10\n",
    "    )\n",
    "    histories[name] = history"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "## Visualise Results"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 6,
   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [
    {
     "data": {
      "image/png": "",
      "text/plain": [
       "<Figure size 800x500 with 1 Axes>"
      ]
     },
     "metadata": {},
     "output_type": "display_data"
    },
    {
     "data": {
      "image/png": "",
      "text/plain": [
       "<Figure size 800x500 with 1 Axes>"
      ]
     },
     "metadata": {},
     "output_type": "display_data"
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "# Plot training and validation accuracy curves\n",
    "plt.figure(figsize=(8, 5))\n",
    "colors = ['#1f77b4', '#d62728', '#2ca02c', '#ff7f0e', '#9467bd'] # Distinct colours for each configuration\n",
    "\n",
    "# Plot accuracy curves for each configuration\n",
    "for i, (name, history) in enumerate(histories.items()):\n",
    "    plt.plot(history['accuracy'], color=colors[i], label=f'{experiments[name][\"description\"]} (train)')\n",
    "    plt.plot(history['val_accuracy'], '--', color=colors[i], label=f'{experiments[name][\"description\"]} (val)')\n",
    "plt.title('Model Accuracy (Averaged over 10 trials)')\n",
    "plt.ylabel('Accuracy')\n",
    "plt.xlabel('Epoch')\n",
    "plt.legend(bbox_to_anchor=(1.05, 1), loc='upper left')\n",
    "plt.grid(True)\n",
    "plt.tight_layout()\n",
    "plt.show()\n",
    "\n",
    "# Plot training and validation loss curves\n",
    "plt.figure(figsize=(8, 5))\n",
    "for i, (name, history) in enumerate(histories.items()):\n",
    "    plt.plot(history['loss'], color=colors[i], label=f'{experiments[name][\"description\"]} (train)')\n",
    "    plt.plot(history['val_loss'], '--', color=colors[i], label=f'{experiments[name][\"description\"]} (val)')\n",
    "plt.title('Model Loss (Averaged over 10 trials)')\n",
    "plt.ylabel('Loss')\n",
    "plt.xlabel('Epoch')\n",
    "plt.legend(bbox_to_anchor=(1.05, 1), loc='upper left')\n",
    "plt.grid(True)\n",
    "plt.tight_layout()\n",
    "plt.show()"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "## Final Results"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 10,
   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [
    {
     "name": "stdout",
     "output_type": "stream",
     "text": [
      "Final Results (averaged over 10 trials):\n",
      "\n",
      "4-5-3-3 (original):\n",
      "Training Accuracy: 0.9829 ± 0.0057\n",
      "Validation Accuracy: 0.9378 ± 0.0218\n",
      "Training Loss: 0.0523 ± 0.0043\n",
      "Validation Loss: 0.1624 ± 0.0341\n",
      "\n",
      "4-3-3 (smaller):\n",
      "Training Accuracy: 0.9819 ± 0.0029\n",
      "Validation Accuracy: 0.9244 ± 0.0147\n",
      "Training Loss: 0.0410 ± 0.0087\n",
      "Validation Loss: 0.1774 ± 0.0235\n",
      "\n",
      "4-8-6-3 (larger):\n",
      "Training Accuracy: 0.9829 ± 0.0057\n",
      "Validation Accuracy: 0.9467 ± 0.0147\n",
      "Training Loss: 0.0408 ± 0.0064\n",
      "Validation Loss: 0.1786 ± 0.0262\n",
      "\n",
      "4-5-3-3 (ReLU):\n",
      "Training Accuracy: 0.8571 ± 0.2374\n",
      "Validation Accuracy: 0.8244 ± 0.1969\n",
      "Training Loss: 0.2408 ± 0.3813\n",
      "Validation Loss: 0.3291 ± 0.3198\n",
      "\n",
      "4-6-4-4-3 (deep):\n",
      "Training Accuracy: 0.9743 ± 0.0113\n",
      "Validation Accuracy: 0.9333 ± 0.0263\n",
      "Training Loss: 0.0698 ± 0.0285\n",
      "Validation Loss: 0.1849 ± 0.0543\n"
     ]
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "# Display final metrics with standard deviations for each configuration\n",
    "print(\"Final Results (averaged over 10 trials):\")\n",
    "for name, history in histories.items():\n",
    "   print(f\"\\n{experiments[name]['description']}:\")\n",
    "   print(f\"Training Accuracy: {history['accuracy'][-1]:.4f} ± {history['std_accuracy'][-1]:.4f}\")\n",
    "   print(f\"Validation Accuracy: {history['val_accuracy'][-1]:.4f} ± {history['std_val_accuracy'][-1]:.4f}\")\n",
    "   print(f\"Training Loss: {history['loss'][-1]:.4f} ± {history['std_loss'][-1]:.4f}\")\n",
    "   print(f\"Validation Loss: {history['val_loss'][-1]:.4f} ± {history['std_val_loss'][-1]:.4f}\")"
   ]
  }
 ],
